title: AE2_bright_assets_and_redraws
description: This is a backport of highlight material assets from AppliedEnergistics2 and its accompanying modules, as well as a repaint of some material assets.
body:
# **AE2_bright_assets_and_redraws**

- This is a backport of highlight material assets from AppliedEnergistics2 and its accompanying modules, as well as a repaint of some material assets.

**Main changes:**
1. The display components, upgrade card slots, and network tool card slot packages are no longer separated from the terminal.
2. The network tool card slot package is adapted to the GUI of all work blocks as much as possible (a large number of texture packs have not completed this work).
3. Redraw AE2Additions material is a highlight style material.
4. Adjust the GUI such as terminal slots to make it more aesthetically pleasing.
5. Redraw the materials of some niche modules to make them more like bright-colored AE equipment.
6. Draw a few items exclusive to the creative mode as dynamic materials.
7. Modified the shortcut inventory style.

Yes, this texture pack was born entirely for the aesthetic effect, so it does not fully comply with the painting rules and styles of AE2 highlight materials, but I tried my best to draw, it is a matter of ability.

**Compatible mods:**
1. Applied_Energistics2
2. AdvancedAE
3. ExtendedAE
4. AE_Additions
5. Applied_Energistics_2_wireless_Terminals
6. Applied_Flux
7. MEGA_Cells
8. Applied_Botanics_Addon
9. Applied_Mekanistics
10. ME_Requester
11. AppliedE
12. ExtendedAE_plus
13. ME_Beam_Former
14. AE_Wireless_Transceiver
15. AE2_Toggleable_View_Cell
16. Useless_Mod
17. GTOEX
18. Ars Energistique      --->   V1.0.3

19. AE2 Import Export Card
20. Modern AE2 Additions (beta.j)
21. AE2 Network Analyser
22. AE2 Pattern Encoding Access Terminal
23. ae2-personal-me-system
24. Programmed Circuit Card       ----The above content--->   V1.0.4
25. AE2 Crystal Science.
26. aehelpers_more.
27. advanced_memory_card.
28. ae2 overclocked.
29. Industrial Foregoing(ifsoulsdisks).
30. AEA.
31. Polymorphic Energistics       ----The above content--->   V1.1.0
32. Infinite Empty Pattern
33. Applied Cooking
34. Applied Web Terminal
35. AE2 Generators
36. UnAE2Addon                    ----The above content--->   V1.1.1
37. AE2 Things
38. More AE2 Additions
39. AE2 MEGA Things
40. Expanded AE                   ----The above content--->   V1.1.2
41. Applied Sorting
42. AE2: Crafting Tree            ----The above content--->   V1.1.3
43. ME infinity Cell
44. Extended_Terminal
45. AE2 Addonlib
46. Applied Create                ----The above content--->   V1.1.4
